title: (BUG) nie-monero/src/lib.rs: MoneroKeys spend/view key bytes not zeroized on drop
description: MoneroKeys.spend_key_bytes ([u8; 32]) and view_key_bytes ([u8; 32]) are plain arrays with no ZeroizeOnDrop. The struct derives Clone, Serialize, and Deserialize, meaning key material can be serialized to disk or network, and the heap-allocated copies are never cleared when dropped. This is inconsistent with every other key type in the codebase (Sapling uses Zeroizing<[u8;169]>, Orchard uses Zeroizing<[u8;32]>). A process crash dump, core file, or swap partition can expose live spend keys. Fix: wrap both fields in Zeroizing<[u8;32]>, add ZeroizeOnDrop, and remove the derived Serialize/Deserialize impls (or replace them with custom impls that do not serialize the raw scalar bytes).
